_README: OPTIMISTIC critical-path plan for the NR4A3 PROTAC-degrader paper (ChemRxiv preprint + JCIM).
This file is the SINGLE SOURCE the daily status email projects into a day-by-day calendar.
It is MAINTAINED BY SESSIONS: as work lands, update each milestone's `status` and, for an
in-progress item, `remaining_days` (what's left, not the original estimate). The email walks the
milestones in dependency order from *today* and assigns optimistic start/finish dates.
Durations are OPTIMISTIC planning estimates ('if all goes to plan'), NOT commitments — GPU spot
capacity waits, failed shards, and red-team findings routinely add days. `status`: done | in_progress | pending.
`track`: gpu | cpu | write | submit.  `parallel_ok`: true = may overlap other gpu legs up to the 8-wide spot quota.
Keep the human-readable rationale for each item in nr4a3-degrader-next-steps.md; this file is just the schedule.
2026-07-15 (trimcrae): TRACK A SHELVED, GO TRACK B. The plan is now trimcrae's three-step spine:
(1) rbfe_congeneric  - verify FEP converges on the KNOWN literature NR4A3 molecule (Zaienne cmpd19); RBFE.
(2) ternary_nrv04    - verify we can replicate the patented NR4A1 degrader's selectivity in-silico (the GATE).
(3) ternary_prospective - design + ternary-test degraders on the cmpd19 anchor; a selective hit is the WIN.
The ABFE warhead-validation milestones (abfe_lambda_repair, abfe_replicates, t4l_benchmark) are moved to the
`shelved` block below - the email projector only reads `milestones`, so they are excluded from the calendar

milestones.title: Step 1: FEP converges on the known literature NR4A3 molecule - congeneric RBFE (Zaienne cmpd19-anchored warhead matrix; primary quantitative tool)
milestones.note: RBFE not ABFE; cmpd19 is functional engagement (no solved pose), so 'converges' = reproducible RELATIVE dG on modeled druggable conformers. Pilot one edge, then fan the tranche out 8-wide. NB: congeneric-RBFE-v3 jobs were failing (ExecuteUserScriptError) - fix before more retries.

milestones.title: Step 2: replicate the patented NR4A1 degrader's selectivity in-silico - retrospective NR-V04 ternary control (recover NR4A1-degraded / NR4A2.NR4A3-spared)
milestones.note: The GATE on all prospective ranking. Functional retrospective control (Wang 2024 has NO solved ternary structure - not an architecture match). Pilot one paralogue / the epimer functional control first; abort if the known outcome is not recovered. Runs in parallel with step 1.

milestones.title: Step 3: design + ternary-test degraders on the cmpd19 anchor - a selective hit is the WIN (prospective NR4A3 ternary ranking of the matrix)
milestones.note: Only if the NR-V04 control (step 2) passes. Selectivity emerges jointly from warhead x linker x E3 x ternary geometry.

milestones.title: Supporting: harmonized pocket-tracking re-analysis (finalize Gate 2 druggability wording in the paper)
milestones.note: Cheap CPU; not a headline step - finalizes the paper's Gate-2 druggability wording.

milestones.title: Fold all results into paper (abstract/S2/S3/S4 + SI) and re-render figures
milestones.note: Single source of truth = nr4a3-degrader-paper.md (+ SI).

milestones.title: Final red-team + review-response pass (honest-weight every claim; medical-integrity check)
milestones.note: Reviewer-AI block before the outward-facing post/submit step.

milestones.title: Post ChemRxiv (CC-BY) + submit JCIM + send outreach emails
milestones.note: OUTWARD-FACING / irreversible - needs trimcrae sign-off (not auto). This is the finish line.

shelved._reason: TRACK A SHELVED 2026-07-15 (trimcrae): the de novo warhead / ABFE-validation track is parked in favour of the Track B ternary workflow. RBFE (not ABFE) is now the binary tool. These are retained (revisit-when-warranted, e.g. if the ternary workflow needs an absolute-affinity anchor a coming method makes cheap) and are EXCLUDED from the email schedule projection.

milestones.title: ABFE lambda-overlap repair (r1: NR4A2 soft-core tail; validate adjacent-window overlap)
milestones.note: Was in_progress; shelved with Track A 2026-07-15.

milestones.title: ABFE 3 independent replicates - NR4A3 conformers + matched NR4A1/NR4A2, explicit microstates, replicate-SD error bars
milestones.note: Field-standard ABFE warhead validation; shelved with Track A 2026-07-15.

milestones.title: T4L-L99A ABFE benchmark (known-answer validation control for the ABFE engine)
milestones.note: ABFE engine control; shelved with Track A 2026-07-15 (no longer running ABFE).
